mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO data.report_data (tenant_id, report_id, row_no, data_json, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.reportId}, #{item.rowNo}, #{item.dataJson}::jsonb, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM data.report_data WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data.report_data WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND report_id = #{reportId}
